name: 锯齿爪刀（★） | 多普勒
descriptionEn: This ivory-handled karambit features brass rivets and saw-tooth ridges, so it cuts on the way in, and tears on the way out. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated. Getting lost in its color can prove fatal
descriptionZh: 这把象牙把手的爪子刀搭配了铜钉和锯齿刀背，以达到进刀切割、出刀撕裂的效果。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了糖衣。 被其外表所迷惑后果会很严重
